name: mern-basics
description: MERN stack project - Client and Server

scripts.setup-project: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && echo 'Server installation will begin in 3 seconds...' && sleep 3 && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.dev:app: concurrently "npm run dev:watch --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
